## คำสั่ง maintenance

```bash

node scripts/admin/gen_risk_register.mjs

# ตรวจ handoff format
node scripts/admin/handoff_lint.mjs handoffs/GUARD_20260523_v3.md

# BIG overview
node scripts/admin/big_status.mjs --verbose
```
